(source map)\n```\nThis is a common pattern in JavaScript/TypeScript projects, especially for library or component module files. The embedded source map in base64 is also standard for debugging transpiled or minified code.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmed Issues:\n- **Presence of sourceMappingURL comment with base64-encoded source map:** This is typical for debugging purposes and does not indicate malicious activity.\n- **No suspicious code, obfuscation, or embedded secrets:** The code only performs static re-exports.\n\n### Flaws or Mistakes in the Reports:\n- The reports are consistent and correctly identify that this code is benign.
